2394860.name: Castle Clicker Screensaver
2394860.description:
Save your screen the 90's way with this Castle Clicker screensaver! Watch as the screensaver automatically builds up every building and ship in the game. You can also click alongside to hurry progress! Click any key to exit.


To access this content please do the following…

Right click Castle Clicker in your Steam Library and select "Properties".
Under the “Local Files” tab, select “Browse…”.
Go to the "screensave" folder
Search for the file “CastleClicker.scr”
Right click the file and select “Install”.
